name: RPlog_Danik_vs_Sandor
title: Danik vs Sandor
summary: On the recreation deck, Sergeant Major Sandor Woden escorts the demoted Corporal Cantrell (Wescal) to the firing range, where the two bond over Sandor's prized F-31 sniper rifle and trade marksmanship. Grand Admiral Danik Kreldin arrives to greet his old comrades, and after some banter about Cantrell's odd reduction in rank, Danik proposes a friendly duel with vibroblades. Sandor turns it into a no-holds-barred sparring match, stunning Danik and trading kicks and grapples until the aging admiral pins him with a vibro-knife at his throat. Rather than claim his hollow victory, Danik spares Sandor and sinks into a brooding monologue about his thirty-six years of war, his countless dead, and the depression and madness that haunt him. Cantrell breaks the somber mood with bravado about the strong surviving and the weak perishing, and Danik departs, warning Sandor he must learn to cut off his emotions and focus only on the mission, and telling Cantrell to keep Sandor out of the brig.
